sentences.english: I always sat in the back of the class so the teacher wouldn't call on me.
sentences.korean: 선생님이 나를 안 시키도록 항상 뒤에 앉았어요.

sentences.english: I was so shy back then.
I loved group projects because I could talk instead of writing.
sentences.korean: 쓰는 대신 말할 수 있어서 그룹 프로젝트를 좋아했어요.

sentences.english: My favorite memory is when our teacher brought a guitar to class and we all sang together, it was so unexpected.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋은 기억은 선생님이 교실에 기타를 가져와서 다 같이 노래한 거예요. 너무 뜻밖이었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
